name: Uncle John's Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 10 Beaten eggs, one at a time (to desired richness)
recipeInstructions:
For a 4-5 quart freezer.
Mix in a large saucepan:
In a double boiler bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
When it starts to thicken, remove from heat.
Immediately add 2 cups cold milk, 1/2 teaspoon almond extract, 2-4 tablespoons vanilla.
Pour into freezer can and finish filling to fill line with milk (or half-and-half!).
Freeze according to freezer directions...
